overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in armored spacesuit exploring an industrial facility. The character moves from a reception area through maintenance corridors and down stairs into a large circular chamber. The environment features concrete walls, metal piping, and artificial yellow lighting throughout.

green leafy plant in pot on floor
glass window with metal bars behind the desk

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a reception desk in a dimly lit industrial facility. An NPC sits behind the counter as the character turns and walks away, passing a potted plant and moving toward a stairwell entrance visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a maintenance area with exposed industrial pipes and machinery. A worker sweeps the floor on the right as the character approaches a stairwell entrance leading to a lower level.

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow concrete stairwell with metal handrails. The industrial machinery from the upper level remains visible in the distance to the right as the character approaches the lower corridor entrance.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long industrial corridor with metal security grating on the left wall and wooden shelving on the right. Exposed pipes run along the ceiling as the character moves toward a brightly lit opening at the far end.

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance to a large circular room with central structure

circular platform or machine in center of room

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a large circular chamber with bright overhead lighting. A prominent central structure or platform sits in the middle of the room as the character approaches the entrance, transitioning from the narrow corridor to the open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit industrial facility that gradually opens into a vast, brightly lit circular chamber. It begins at a reception desk where the character turns away from an NPC, passing a potted plant as they move toward a distant stairwell. As the character enters a maintenance area filled with exposed pipes and machinery, they pass a worker sweeping the floor before descending a narrow concrete stairwell with metal handrails. The scene then shifts into a long industrial corridor lined with security grating and wooden shelving, following the character toward a glowing opening at the far end. Finally, the narrow passage expands into a large circular chamber featuring bright overhead lighting and a prominent central platform.
